plan: Eliminate all leveraged ETFs to reduce risk.
Reduce exposure in concentrated tech/semis.
Increase allocation to income-generating ETFs.
Boost position in broad market index ETFs.
Add a top-rated technology sector ETF for stability.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation with lower volatility.
conservative.read: Targeting around 1.5% monthly return with a focus on capital preservation. Expect lower drawdowns but also reduced upside potential.

plan: Slightly reduce exposure in leveraged ETFs.
Trim concentrated tech and semiconductor holdings.
Increase allocation to broad market index ETFs.
Add a high-quality technology sector ETF.
Introduce a semiconductor name with strong risk/reward.
This plan aims for risk-first growth with moderate leverage.
balanced.read: Targeting around 2.5% monthly return, balancing growth with risk management. Expect moderate drawdowns and potential for solid gains.

plan: Increase allocation to leveraged semiconductor ETF.
Boost positions in strong tech and semiconductor names.
Reduce exposure in broad market index ETFs.
Decrease allocation to income-generating ETFs.
Add semiconductor names with top risk/reward scores.
This plan maximizes growth potential with higher leverage and concentration.
aggressive.read: Targeting around 4% monthly return, accepting significantly higher potential drawdowns. Leverage and concentration amplify both gains and losses; daily decay in leveraged ETFs is a factor.

plan: Eliminate all leveraged and high-beta single names.
Maximize allocation to income-focused ETFs.
Increase position in broad market index ETFs.
Add a technology sector ETF for potential stability.
This plan prioritizes steady monthly distributions and low drawdowns.
Focus is on capital preservation and reliable income over growth.
income.read: Targeting around 1% monthly return, prioritizing stable income and capital preservation. Distributions are variable and NAV can still fall; this is not a savings account.
